title: Show of Shows
writer: J. Keirn Brennan, Frank Fay, William Shakespeare
actors: Frank Fay, William Courtenay, H.B. Warner
plot: In 1929, the studio gave the cinema its voice and offered audiences a chance to hear their favorite actors and actresses from the silent-screen era. For the first time, they can be heard in a gaudy, grandiose musical-comedy revue....
